## Verses (8)

| # | Basic English Bible | Compare |
|---|---|---|
| [1](BBE.md#v1) | Great have been my troubles from the time when I was young (let Israel now say); | [WEB](WEB.md#v1) · [KJV](KJV.md#v1) · [ASV](ASV.md#v1) |
| [2](BBE.md#v2) | Great have been my troubles from the time when I was young, but my troubles have not overcome me. | [WEB](WEB.md#v2) · [KJV](KJV.md#v2) · [ASV](ASV.md#v2) |
| [3](BBE.md#v3) | The ploughmen were ploughing on my back; long were the wounds they made. | [WEB](WEB.md#v3) · [KJV](KJV.md#v3) · [ASV](ASV.md#v3) |
| [4](BBE.md#v4) | The Lord is true: the cords of the evil-doers are broken in two. | [WEB](WEB.md#v4) · [KJV](KJV.md#v4) · [ASV](ASV.md#v4) |
| [5](BBE.md#v5) | Let all the haters of Zion be shamed and turned back. | [WEB](WEB.md#v5) · [KJV](KJV.md#v5) · [ASV](ASV.md#v5) |
| [6](BBE.md#v6) | Let them be like the grass on the house-tops, which is dry before it comes to full growth. | [WEB](WEB.md#v6) · [KJV](KJV.md#v6) · [ASV](ASV.md#v6) |
| [7](BBE.md#v7) | He who gets in the grain has no use for it; and they do not make bands of it for the grain-stems. | [WEB](WEB.md#v7) · [KJV](KJV.md#v7) · [ASV](ASV.md#v7) |
| [8](BBE.md#v8) | And those who go by do not say, The blessing of the Lord be on you; we give you blessing in the name of the Lord. | [WEB](WEB.md#v8) · [KJV](KJV.md#v8) · [ASV](ASV.md#v8) |
